output_debit_classifier.reason: This transaction represents the payment of an existing liability. The company issued a cheque (cash payment) to settle $50 of accounts payable. Under double-entry bookkeeping, when a liability is settled, we debit the liability account to reduce it, and credit the cash account to reflect the outflow of cash. The entry balances at $50 debit and $50 credit.
